/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pandelay.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,pandelay.so -o pandelay.so CMakeFiles/pandelay.dir/ladspapandelay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pandelay.dir/pandelay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pandelay.dir/pandelaymodel.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules
